rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a polar bear than a house cat?
rounds.fact: A house cat weighs ~4 kg; a male polar bear averages ~500 kg — 125× heavier. Polar bears are the world's largest land carnivore.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is a blue whale than a bottlenose dolphin?
rounds.fact: A dolphin is ~3 m; a blue whale is ~29 m — nearly 10× longer. The blue whale is the largest animal ever to have lived on Earth.

rounds.prompt: How many times faster can a peregrine falcon dive than a cheetah can run?
rounds.fact: A cheetah tops ~112 km/h; a peregrine falcon dives at ~390 km/h — 3.5× faster. It's the fastest movement of any animal.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is an African elephant than a Labrador?
rounds.fact: A Labrador weighs ~32 kg; an African elephant ~6,000 kg — 187× heavier. Elephants are the largest land animals alive today.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the lifespan of a Greenland shark than a house mouse?
rounds.fact: A house mouse lives ~2 years; a Greenland shark can live ~400 years — 200× longer. They reach sexual maturity at ~150 years old.
